claim: Cursor Copilot++ auto-completes multiple lines contextually aware, not just next token; enables non-sequential code generation
actionable: Use Copilot++ for multi-line context-aware auto-completion; let it generate related functions/blocks in parallel rather than line-by-line
source_title: Is Cursor's Copilot++ BETTER than Github Copilot? FAST AI Coding Master Class

claim: AI coding agents are true AI coding assistants (Cursor, Codex), not just code completion (GitHub Copilot); assistants run full agentic loops
actionable: Use true coding assistants for feature development, not just completion tools; assistants can iterate and refine, completion tools cannot
source_title: Is Cursor's Copilot++ BETTER than Github Copilot? FAST AI Coding Master Class

claim: Reference documentation in Cursor enables context-aware code generation from docs without manual copy-paste; agents read and apply doc content
actionable: Index API/library documentation in Cursor's docs feature; reference it in prompts and let agent apply patterns from docs automatically
source_title: Is Cursor's Copilot++ BETTER than Github Copilot? FAST AI Coding Master Class

claim: Running multiple concurrent prompts in coding agents lets you optimize different parts of UI/styling in parallel without blocking
actionable: Queue multiple non-dependent prompts in parallel (styling + layout + functionality) to parallelize code generation across components
source_title: Is Cursor's Copilot++ BETTER than Github Copilot? FAST AI Coding Master Class
